rules.message: GPIO0 must be pulled HIGH during normal boot. Currently configured as OUTPUT in download mode.
rules.fix_suggestion: Remove OUTPUT configuration from GPIO0 or add 10K pull-up resistor to VCC.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Datasheet v4.2, Section 2.4 - Strapping Pins

rules.message: GPIO2 strapping pin LOW selects 3.3V flash, but flash_voltage is configured as 1.8V.
rules.fix_suggestion: Pull GPIO2 HIGH for 1.8V flash or reconfigure flash_voltage to 3.3V.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Datasheet v4.2, Section 2.4.3 - GPIO2 Flash Voltage

rules.message: GPIO12 HIGH selects 1.8V VDD_SDIO, incompatible with 3.3V flash.
rules.fix_suggestion: Pull GPIO12 LOW for 3.3V flash operation.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Datasheet v4.2, Section 2.4.4 - GPIO12 VDD_SDIO

rules.message: GPIO34 is input-only. Cannot be configured as OUTPUT.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use GPIO 0-33 for OUTPUT. GPIO34-39 are input-only.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Datasheet v4.2, Section 4.2 - IO_MUX Pad List

rules.message: GPIO35 is input-only. Cannot be configured as OUTPUT.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use GPIO 0-33 for OUTPUT. GPIO34-39 are input-only.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Datasheet v4.2, Section 4.2 - IO_MUX Pad List

rules.message: ADC2 cannot be used when WiFi is active. Hardware conflict.
rules.fix_suggestion: Use ADC1 (GPIO32-39) for analog reads when WiFi is enabled, or disable WiFi during ADC2 sampling.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Technical Reference Manual v4.6, Section 4.11.4 - ADC Limitations

rules.condition: GPIO6 == USER_DEFINED || GPIO7 == USER_DEFINED || GPIO8 == USER_DEFINED || GPIO9 == USER_DEFINED || GPIO10 == USER_DEFINED || GPIO11 == USER_DEFINED
rules.message: GPIO 6-11 are connected to integrated SPI flash. Cannot be used for general purpose IO.
rules.fix_suggestion: Avoid GPIO 6-11. Use other available GPIOs.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Datasheet v4.2, Section 2.2 - Pin Definitions

rules.message: UART baud rate exceeds maximum supported frequency of 5 Mbps.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Technical Reference Manual v4.6, Section 13.2.1 - UART Baud Rate

rules.message: GPIO output current exceeds maximum rating of 40mA per pin.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Datasheet v4.2, Section 5.1 - Absolute Maximum Ratings

rules.condition: log_contains('Timed out waiting for packet header')
rules.message: Flashing timeout. ESP32 not entering download mode.
rules.fix_suggestion: Hold GPIO0 LOW and press EN button to enter download mode. Check USB cable and drivers.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP32 Datasheet v4.2, Section 2.4 - Boot Mode Selection

rules.message: Task stack size below recommended minimum of 2KB. Risk of stack overflow.
rules.fix_suggestion: Increase stack size to >= 2048 bytes for FreeRTOS tasks.
rules.datasheet_reference: ESP-IDF Programming Guide, FreeRTOS - Task Creation

input_only_pins.description: Generate rules for all input-only GPIOs (34-39)

strapping_pin_conflicts.description: Generate rules for all strapping pin combinations
strapping_pin_conflicts.expansion: pins: [0, 2, 5, 12, 15], modes: [INPUT, OUTPUT, INPUT_PULLUP, INPUT_PULLDOWN], states: [normal, download, sdio]

adc2_wifi_conflicts.description: Generate rules for ADC2 channels vs WiFi

pwm_channel_limits.description: Generate rules for LEDC PWM frequency limits per channel
